name: Real-Time Feasibility Assessment for AAM Adhoc Bookings
description: Parallel real-time validation of aircraft, pilots, vertiports, route, weather, and regulatory status to generate an offer or a rejection.

operatorContext._comment: Operator identity and policy context for which this process is deployed and executed

bookingRequest._comment: Normalized booking request derived from AAMShoppingRQ at entry point.

bookingWindow._comment: Output of booking window toolkit check—indicates operator/vertiport window validity and constraints.

aam_booking_validation_result._comment: Rule engine evaluation result for initial booking feasibility (ordering window, constraints).

aircraftAvailabilityCandidates._comment: Raw list of aircraft returned by the Aircraft Availability toolkit for the padded search window.

filteredAvailableAircraft._comment: Filtered aircraft list produced by the aircraft selection rule engine (airworthy, battery, maintenance, window intersection, proximity).

pilotAvailabilityCandidatesByAircraft._comment: Raw pilot availability grouped by aircraft returned by the Pilot Inventory service (padded window).

filteredAvailablePilotsByAircraft._comment: Pilot-rule-engine filtered pilots per aircraft (license, rest, duty, proximity, type currency, etc.).

slotsAvailabilityCandidatesByVertiports._comment: Toolkit output capturing slot, pad, and charging bay availability for origin/destination vertiports.

filteredAvailableSlotsByVertiports._comment: Vertiport Rule engine evaluation for vertiport capacity policy (window overlap, pad sufficiency, FATO requirements, charging bay advisory).

routeCorridorCandidates._comment: Raw corridors (with overlays/load/length) fetched for operating cluster/region/zones in the requested window

filteredFeasibleRoutes._comment: Rule-engine output: feasibility screen + ranking with top 3 routes

regulatoryComplianceCatalog._comment: Regulatory catalog for the request: cluster/region/zones + operator profile (insurance/certs/authorizations).

regulatoryComplianceEvaluation._comment: Rule-engine output: compliance results, constraints, remediations.

operatingWeatherCondition._comment: Raw operating weather + micro-weather conditions for a cluster/region/zones/vertiports.

operatingWeatherEvaluation._comment: Rule-engine output: weather minima evaluation, acceptable windows, limiting factors.

aggregateFeasibilityContext._comment: Unified aggregation of feasibility results across aircraft, pilots, vertiports, routes, regulatory, and operating weather checks.

pricingAndEtaResult._comment: Computed dynamic pricing, ETA, and fare breakdown derived from aggregated feasibility context.

aggregatedResultValidation._comment: Final rule-engine evaluation aggregating all feasibility checks into a single PASS/FAIL decision with confidence score and blocking violations.

offerContent._comment: Rich Media content for the offer generated

bookingOfferInfo._comment: Process-level object holding aggregated feasibility, pricing, and ETA used to generate the final booking offer.

bookingRejectionInfo._comment: Detailed decline information returned when feasibility checks fail (with reasons and alternatives).

mapped_process_context.map: { operatorCode: operator.operatorCode, operatorName: operator.operatorName, operatorType: operator.operatorType,  environment: operator.environment, region: operator.region }

tasks.name: Validate Booking Request and perform booking window checks
tasks.description: validate incoming booking requests by performing booking window checks and also evaluate booking feasibility rules

execution_steps.name: Fetch operating and booking window details

successCriteria.message: Operations are disabled for the requested route/date.
Booking is outside the acceptable ordering window for operator/vertiports.

execution_steps.name: Evaluate booking feasibility rules with the rule engine

successCriteria.message: Rule evaluation failed one or more critical checks.

tasks.name: Check fleet availability status in real-time
tasks.description: Fetch all candidate aircraft available and filter using airworthiness, maintenance, battery, proximity and window intersections

execution_steps.name: Fetch Aircraft Availability including a Padded Window (-1h to +2h) to booking requested time

successCriteria.message: No aircraft candidates returned for the requested window.

execution_steps.name: Apply Aircraft Filtering Rules (Airworthy, Maintenance, Battery, Proximity, Window Intersection)

successCriteria.message: No aircraft satisfy all rules (airworthy, not in maintenance, battery ≥ 80%, origin/nearby, availability window overlap).

tasks.name: Check Pilot Availability and duty status in real-time
tasks.description: Fetch all candidate Pilots available and filter using certifications, rank, duty hours, rest period, proximity and window intersections

execution_steps.name: Fetch Pilot Availability by Aircraft for Padded Window (-1h to +2h)

successCriteria.message: No pilot availability returned for any filtered aircraft in the padded window.

execution_steps.name: Apply Pilot Rules per Aircraft (License, Duty, Rest, Window, Status, Proximity)

successCriteria.message: No aircraft have at least one pilot who satisfies all mandatory criteria.

tasks.name: Check Availability of takeoff and landing slots in Origin and Destination vertiports
tasks.description: Fetch vertiport slots available and filter using availability of FATO PADs for take-off and landing, availability of required buffer times, proximity and window intersections

execution_steps.name: Fetch Vertiport Slot/Pad Capacity

successCriteria.message: No origin vertiport slots in requested window.
No destination vertiport slots in requested window.

execution_steps.name: Evaluate Vertiport Capacity & Buffer Rules

successCriteria.message: Vertiport capacity policy constraints not satisfied.

tasks.name: Perform Route Feasibility checks for TFR/No-Fly, Range, Weather, ATC/UTM and return top-3 corridors
tasks.description: Fetch approved corridors by cluster/region/zones and validate them for TFRs/No-Fly, aircraft range, weather minima and ATC/UTM sector capacity; rank and return the best three.

execution_steps.name: Fetch approved route corridors matching cluster/region/zones for requested window

successCriteria.message: No approved corridors found for the requested cluster/region/zones/time window.

execution_steps.name: Evaluate Route Feasibility Rules (No TFRs/No-Fly, Range, Weather, ATC/UTM capacity) and rank top 3

successCriteria.message: No route corridor satisfies mandatory feasibility constraints.
Rules did not return any feasible corridor.

tasks.name: Check Regulatory compliance for region/zone, time, noise, insurance, operator certifications
tasks.description: Fetch compliance catalog for operating cluster/region/zones, then validate operator approvals, curfews, noise limits, insurance, certifications, UTM/Remote ID and related policies.

execution_steps.name: Fetch regulatory catalog (cluster/region/zones + operator profile)

successCriteria.message: No regulatory policies returned for the requested region/zones.

execution_steps.name: Validate Regulatory Compliance (approvals, curfew, noise, insurance, certifications, UTM/Remote ID, etc.)

tasks.name: Real-Time Weather check for operating minima (wind, visibility, sig weather, micro-weather at vertiports)
tasks.description: Fetch cluster/region/zone weather + vertiport micro-weather (VORTEX, wake turbulence, LLWS) and validate against operator/aircraft minima; produce acceptable windows and advisories.

execution_steps.name: Fetch Operating Weather & Micro-Weather for cluster/region/zones and vertiports

successCriteria.message: No operating weather data returned for requested window/area.

execution_steps.name: Evaluate Weather Against Operational Minima & Derive Acceptable Windows

successCriteria.message: Operating weather does not meet mandatory minima.

tasks.name: Combine all validation results, calculate dynamic price & ETA
tasks.description: Aggregates feasibility results, computes ETA and pricing, and evaluates PASS-only feasibility outcome.

execution_steps.name: Aggregate all feasibility results into unified context
Compute Dynamic Pricing & ETA
Aggregate feasibility PASS gate + confidence score

tasks.name: Generate Booking Offer Response
tasks.description: Generates full AAMShoppingRS success (with enriched catalog content/media) or declined response based on aggregated feasibility outcome.

execution_steps.name: Enrich offer with catalog content (aircraft/vertiports/services/media)

successCriteria.message: Offer content enrichment did not return required vertiport/aircraft media content.

execution_steps.name: Build AAMShoppingRS Success
Build AAMShoppingRS Declined

Errors.Reason: 'Booking cannot be confirmed due to feasibility constraints'
